info.name: Notexa API - Complete Collection
info.description:
Notexa API collection for the current Laravel backend.

Base URL: http://127.0.0.1:8000/api

Auth: Bearer Token from /login or /register.

Email verification: when enabled in Admin Settings, registration sends a 6-digit SMTP code and users verify with /email/verify-code.

Password reset: /forgot-password sends a 6-digit SMTP code and /reset-password applies it with a new password.

Notes: archive is removed; use trash, restore, permanent delete, pin, share codes, collaborators, and version history restore.

Realtime collaboration: the Next.js editor uses Yjs WebRTC rooms for authorized note editors; REST endpoints manage note sharing permissions and share codes.

AI: /notes/{note}/ai-summary and /notes/{note}/ai-query use admin-configured backend API keys only. Public settings expose ai_enabled, not private keys or personal workspace keys.

Files: supported previews use signed URLs for PDFs, text/code, and images; unsafe executable preview is blocked.

Admin: admin@notexa.com / password123
